history.note: 请接手 sprint-20260530-p0-修复单-actorhost-taxonomy-与-actor-first-runtime-落地补齐-s01-requirements：读取 .prd.md 和 .contract.md，产出 sprint-20260530-p0-修复单-actorhost-taxonomy-与-actor-first-runtime-落地补齐-s01-requirements.plan.md 和 sprint-20260530-p0-修复单-actorhost-taxonomy-与-actor-first-runtime-落地补齐-s01-requirements.task_graph.json。task_graph 必须通过 solar-harness graph-scheduler validate。不要问用户拍板；这是 P0 reliability 默认推进。
Workflow guard: planner must produce design.md, plan.md, and task_graph.json before builder dispatch.

Planner produced design.md + plan.md + task_graph.json (5 nodes, DAG validated). Status -> active for builder DAG dispatch.
task_graph changed while in flight; refreshing legacy status projection
请接手 sprint-20260530-p0-修复单-actorhost-taxonomy-与-actor-first-runtime-落地补齐-s01-requirements：读取 task_graph.json，并按 DAG/graph-dispatch 执行 ready nodes；禁止在缺少 DAG 时直接写 parent handoff。
Workflow guard: PM PRD + planner design/plan/task_graph are ready; builder DAG dispatch is allowed.
